The '''''Triumph''''' was a [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] in the [[Kathol Republic Navy]]. The ship was commanded by [[Hendric Faile]], and carried a complement of [[Kathol Republic Marines|marines]] onboard.

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Triumph'' responded to a distress call from the ''[[Bravado III]]'' alongside her sister ships ''[[Juno II]]'', ''[[Mirandine]]'', ''[[Quillion]]'', ''[[Siroma]]'', and [[Solidarity (Marauder-class)|''Solidarity'']]. Together, they intercepted the modified [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', and marines from the ''Triumph'' boarded and captured the vessel. The ship then escorted the corvette to be impounded on [[Dayark]].
